title: hieracium glandulinervum
intro: Hieracium glandulinervum, also known as the glandular hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium glandulinervum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health and immunity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
